ddt:Target.Name: 7kW_Charger_C1R_v34
ddt:Target.Description:
Source : Central database / Engineering / Norme 36-00-013b : Request for reading service 19 in specification B
By Christophe CANDAS Sce : 65676
2011-04-20 : Add Template description in receive request
================================================================
v1.0 (09/02/2015) : Created by Gilles BRUST for 7kW charger project (b1r2p0 sw, soft number = 0103 or 0104) v2.0 (11/02/2015) : G.BRUST. For 7kW charger project (>= b1r3p0 sw, soft number = 0105) test v2.1 (25/01/2016) : S. MONIN. 7kW_Charger_b1r3p0_v20-->7kW_Charger_b1r3p0_v21 (Feb 12, 2016 SMO) - Correction Supplier number 147 --> 93H - Addition of SWs (0105.0100, 0200.0000, 0300.0000, 0300.0100, 0400.0000, 0400.0100, 0401.0000, 0401.0100, 0500.0000, 0500.0100, 0500.0200) - Maintenability removed for some services v2.2 (03/05/2016) : S. MONIN 7kW_Charger_b1r3p0_v20-->7kW_Charger_b1r3p0_v22 (May 3, 2016 SMO) - Maintenability added for DID data - HardwareNumber.BasicPartList and PartNumber.BasicPartList corrected - Addition of SWs (0600.0000, 0600.0100) v3.0 (03/05/2016) : S. MONIN 7kW_Charger_D2r0p0_v30 (May 3, 2016 SMO) for SW number 0700 - DTC Device numbers modified v3.1 (Nov 30, 2016) : S. MONIN 7kW_Charger_D2r0p0_v31 - Supply Voltage device renamed to Supply Voltage / EVC - DTCs added: - EVC missing message - Supply Voltage overcurrent - HW Basic Part list corrected - $21F0 service (logzone 0) added - Unused extended data services removed ($1906xxxxxx84 - 87) - double of $220120 service removed - DIDs updated - Supply current ($303D) added - Reset Reason ($3004) added (replacing SafeState) - Addition of SW 0800.0000 v3.2 (Dec 20, 2016) : S. MONIN - Work-around for AR CHG_98 (HW Basic part list): - 0 = 296A1 - 2 = N/A - (Ideally, should be 0 = N/A, 1 = 296A1 but SW correction required) v3.3 (Jan 12, 2017) : S. MONIN - Work-around for ApprovalNumberBasicPartList (blocking CLIP tests) - 30 = 00000 - (Ideally, should be 0 = 00000, but SW correction required and impact of change on already-produced chargers not identified)
v3.4(December 04, 2017) : F.BOURDAIS - Name modification : 7kW_Charger_D2r0p0_vXX => 7KW_Charger_C1R_vXX (link to the EE Architecture) - Project x62 added - New parameter available for the maintenance - Read CHGFault_Type - Read CHGLoadingInterlockState - Read Terminal 30 voltage - Read ACInputFrequency - Read HVVoltage - Read HVOutputCurrent - Read CHGWaterTemp - Read CHGTemp - Read SupplyCurrent - Read CHGAvailableChargingPower - Read PowerDeratingStatus - Read HVOutputPower

Item.Text: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
Device and failure type ODB codding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter_2
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCLastDiseappearMileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCTravelledDistanceFailurePresent
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCFirstAppearMileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSnapshot
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: FailuresDetect.All
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import (Conditional)

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.Mileage
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.AgingCounter
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: TesterPresent.WithResponse
Request.Comment: This request enable P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl, ...)

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Default
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Programming
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC_CPDD Import
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT

Request.Name: DataRead.DELTA internal _ Class E Fault
Request.Comment: Read DELTA internal - Class E Fault

Request.Name: DataWrite.DELTA internal _ Class E Fault
Request.Comment: Write DELTA internal - Class E Fault
